responses.electricityComment: Was a lil inconsistent during the stormy days this year thats the only thing stoping it from five stars
responses.roadComment: They were great then dug up for new sewage pipes
responses.safetyComment: Noida is generally safe till you go to unplanned parts
responses.loveText: Its much more structured and planned with wide enough roads green spaces and public infrastructure
responses.commentsText: For all the great things in noida generally for a public quite comfy there are few very distrubing serial killer american psyco crime cases that we never imagined happens here pop up time to time , yeah you can look that up usually around unplanned parts like the parts that predate the planned noida for example mithari
